title: polystichum gongylodes
intro: Polystichum gongylodes, also known as the Chinese sword fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum gongylodes include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, decoctions, and infusions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
